type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: My task: add resolve_image_with_size(), resolve_audio_with_size(), resolve_document_with_size() methods to ImageBlock/AudioBlock/DocumentBlock classes in types.py, returning (BytesIO, int) tuples. This is the only file I need to touch - it's small, additive changes only (new methods, no edits to existing ones). Since we both need this same file, propose: I'll add my three new methods, tell me your feature so we can interleave non-conflicting edits or take turns. What's your feature/what do you need to change here?

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: My feature: add zero-byte validation to the EXISTING resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods (raise ValueError if buffer is empty). Since we both must touch the same file, let's serialize instead of splitting by file: I'll make my small edits to the three existing resolve_* methods first (minimal diff, no new methods), then send DONE. You then add your three new resolve_*_with_size methods after pulling my changes, so there's no overlap. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT

your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Accepted. I won't touch the internals of your methods, just call them. Go ahead and edit; I'll add mine after, re-reading the file first to pick up your changes.
